thesis: Oil E&P geopolitical upside. WTI <$65 = geopolitical premium unwound = invalidation. Breakeven stop at cost basis on remaining shares.

conditions.label: WTI spot price
conditions.notes: <$65 = INVALIDATION (geopolitical premium unwound)

conditions.label: XOP vs cost basis ($142.49)
conditions.notes: <$142 = BREAKEVEN STOP. >$155 = green

conditions.label: Hormuz status
conditions.notes: Green=closed/restricted, Amber=partial escorts, Red=fully reopened

conditions.label: WTI curve in backwardation
conditions.notes: Green=backwardation, Amber=flat, Red=contango

conditions.label: Geopolitical escalation trend
conditions.notes: Green=escalating/holding, Amber=stalemate, Red=de-escalation confirmed

notes.text: GLOBAL KILL SWITCH: If confirmed ceasefire or Iran capitulation headlines: exit INSW in full, sell 50% XOP, trim RTX to 3 shares. Rotate freed cash into oversold sectors (JETS, XLY) for relief rally. NEM and CIBR hold through de-escalation.
Kill switch: sell 50% XOP on ceasefire.

[4h update 20:26 AEST] US-Israel strikes on Iran enter day 4-6 of active conflict; Iran retaliating across all 6 GCC states, US bases, and Hormuz shipping. VLCC rates at all-time high ($423k/day Mon, $350k/day today) with war risk insurance suspended — tanker/energy thesis intact. $50B Pentagon supplemental budget expected as early as Friday (RTX catalyst). Gold/oil ratio deteriorating (69 from 79, oil +15.6% 5d) — stagflation shift risk flagged for NEM. Ceasefire talks reported across multiple sources but no formal agreement. CIBR and INSW pending Moomoo execution — entry conditions red until filled.

[4h update 00:00 AEST] Brave Search FAILED — all 5 queries returned no results. Price-driven assessment only. WTI $73.61 (-1.3%d, +12.9%5d) | Brent $80.67 | Spread $7.06. CRITICAL: NEM -7.75% vs gold spot +1.82% — unexplained gold miner/spot divergence; GDX -8.76% confirms sector-wide selloff, not NEM-specific. Gold/oil ratio 70.65 vs 79.38 (5d) — nem_goldoil RED persists; nem_ryield stays AMBER — trim trigger NOT activated (requires BOTH red). Last escalation: US strikes Bandar Abbas (Reuters, 3.3h ago) — active window, no 12h gap yet. VLCC last recorded $350k/day (prev cycle) — no new rate data available. VIX 22.35 (down from 23.57). rtx_ceasefire stays AMBER from prior cycle — no new Reuters/AP confirmation or denial. All thesis conditions intact. INSW + CIBR entries still pending Moomoo fill.

[Manual 01:15 AEST] Geographic expansion: US sub sank Iranian frigate in Indian Ocean + Fujairah port strike. Conflict no longer contained to Persian Gulf. RTX ceasefire reverted green — Hegseth/Rubio rhetoric is escalatory not diplomatic. Oman mediation is noise without both parties at the table.

[4h update 12:16 AEST] No new developments in last 4h window. Older context confirms: Hormuz -90% traffic (NBC/Reuters/Bloomberg), VLCC 50k last confirmed (Mon peak 24k — downward trend flagged), war insurance cancelled (Reuters). Iran secret outreach to US (CNN/NYT) but US confirms 'no active negotiations' — market brief de-escalation rally was speculation only. rtx_ceasefire stays GREEN. Strikes continue day 5+. NATO intercepted Iranian missile over Turkey airspace (Reuters) — geographic scope now REGIONAL (4 zones, added Gulf of Oman via Fujairah drone boats). insw_sector downgraded (FRO -2.7%/DHT -2.9% 5d). cibr_earnings upgraded (CRWD record quarter). NEM paradox: nem_goldoil RED + nem_ryield AMBER — trim needs BOTH red, not yet triggered. VIX 21.15, energy 46.7%.

[4h update 16:34 AEST] No new developments in last 4h window. Confirms: Hormuz -90% closed (NBC/Bloomberg/Reuters), VLCC 24k/day (MarineInsight — RISING from 50k, 3-cycle trend UP). Geographic scope upgraded to REGIONAL (5 zones): Gulf of Oman (Iranian drone boats/Fujairah), Arabian Sea (US sub sinks Iranian warship off Sri Lanka), Mediterranean (Cyprus RAF base hit). PSQ psq_qqq_ma corrected to GREEN (QQQ 10.75 < MA50 15.79, inverted). NEM WATCH: nem_goldoil RED (ratio 67.21 vs 79.38 5d — oil +18.5% vs gold +1.6%), nem_ryield AMBER (Treasury yields rising per CNBC, oil-inflation nexus — trim needs BOTH red, not yet triggered). Iran backchannel outreach (CNN/NYT) = noise; US confirms no active negotiations. War powers vote failed — Trump continues strikes. rtx_ceasefire GREEN. Trump naval escort offer dismissed as unlikely near-term (Argus/SSY). VIX 21.15, energy 46.7%, kill switch 0/4 clear.

[4h update 02:00 AEST] 3 new developments since last update. Day 6: AP confirms Iran fires missiles at US military bases + Israel; Israel begins 'broad wave of strikes' on Iran infrastructure (NYT). Hegseth (CBS): 'just getting started.' Trump: progress '15 out of 10.' No ceasefire signal. No toggle changes — all prior statuses maintained. VLCC $424k/day (3-cycle rising trend). Canada PM Carney: can't rule out military participation (coalition widening). House war powers vote pending (Senate failed 47-53). Israel reportedly knocked out Iran cyber HQ (Politico, older context) — cibr_cyber stays GREEN (threat dispersed/elevated per CSIS/PYMNTS). NEM watch: goldoil RED (ratio 66.44 vs 78.04 5d) + ryield AMBER — trim not triggered, needs BOTH red. VIX 21.15 down from 23.57 — watch for <18 (PSQ exit trigger). Energy 46.8%, kill switch 0/4 clear. Storage crisis active: Iraq -1.1mb/d due to storage limits (Reuters/IEA). Ceasefire 2% VERY UNLIKELY (4+ weeks).

thesis: Defence munition replenishment + $68B backlog + structural budget tailwinds. Iran conflict accelerates spend. Floor at $185 even in de-escalation.

conditions.label: No ceasefire announced
conditions.notes: Green=no ceasefire, Amber=backchannel talks reported, Red=formal ceasefire announced. Red ≠ auto-exit → trim to 3 shares.

conditions.label: RTX above $195 (pre-strike level)
conditions.notes: <$195 = INVALIDATION. $185 = full exit.

conditions.label: US defence spending narrative intact
conditions.notes: Green=supplemental appropriations/budget increase, Amber=no change, Red=budget cuts proposed

conditions.label: Conflict duration assessment
conditions.notes: Green=<4wk ongoing, Amber=4-8wk (munition depletion thesis strengthens), Red=>8wk (broader market drag)

conditions.label: Defence sector momentum (ITA/XAR)
conditions.notes: Green=up week-over-week, Amber=flat, Red=down week-over-week

notes.text: GLOBAL KILL SWITCH: If confirmed ceasefire or Iran capitulation headlines: exit INSW in full, sell 50% XOP, trim RTX to 3 shares. Rotate freed cash into oversold sectors (JETS, XLY) for relief rally. NEM and CIBR hold through de-escalation.

thesis: Hormuz closure → record VLCC rates. Best balance sheet in tankers. IMMEDIATE EXIT if Hormuz reopens. Binary position — amber should never persist >1 cycle without action.

conditions.label: Strait of Hormuz closed/restricted
conditions.notes: Green=closed (<20% normal traffic), Amber=partial (20-60% normal, escorted), Red=open (>60%) = IMMEDIATE EXIT. Never sit at amber >1 cycle.

conditions.label: VLCC spot rates above $150k/day
conditions.notes: Green=>$300k/day, Amber=$150-300k/day, Red=<$150k/day

conditions.label: War risk insurance cancelled/elevated
conditions.notes: Green=cancelled/suspended in Gulf, Amber=elevated premiums (>5x normal), Red=reinstated at normal rates

conditions.label: INSW within 10% trailing stop of highest close
conditions.notes: Green=above, Amber=within 3% of trigger, Red=below = IMMEDIATE EXIT. Agent: check 30d high from price data.

conditions.label: Entry status
conditions.notes: Green=filled at target, Amber=filled but gapped up >10%, Red=not yet filled

conditions.label: Tanker sector sentiment (FRO/DHT)
conditions.notes: Green=up week-over-week, Amber=flat, Red=down week-over-week

notes.text: GLOBAL KILL SWITCH: If confirmed ceasefire or Iran capitulation headlines: exit INSW in full, sell 50% XOP, trim RTX to 3 shares. Rotate freed cash into oversold sectors (JETS, XLY) for relief rally. NEM and CIBR hold through de-escalation.
Hormuz reopening = immediate full exit. No negotiation.

thesis: Gold safe haven + operational leverage ($1,680 AISC vs $5,300+ spot = $3,600+ margin/oz). If real yields AND gold/oil ratio both go red simultaneously → trim regardless of spot.

conditions.label: Gold spot price (GC=F)
conditions.notes: <$4800 (3 consecutive closes) = INVALIDATION

conditions.label: NEM above $100 floor
conditions.notes: <$100 = INVALIDATION

conditions.label: Fed rate cut expectations intact
conditions.notes: Green=cuts priced in (dovish), Amber=hold (neutral), Red=hikes priced in (hawkish)

conditions.label: Central bank gold buying continues
conditions.notes: Green=continued/accelerating, Amber=stable, Red=net selling reported

conditions.label: Real yields (10Y TIPS) direction
conditions.notes: Green=falling, Amber=flat, Red=rising >2.5%

conditions.label: Gold/oil ratio stable or rising
conditions.notes: Green=rising (gold outpacing oil), Amber=neutral, Red=falling (oil outpacing gold → stagflation shift). If this + real yields both red → trim.

conditions.label: Iran cyber activity level elevated
conditions.notes: Green=elevated/active incidents, Amber=stable/background, Red=significantly reduced post-ceasefire

conditions.label: CISA staffing still understaffed

conditions.label: Sector earnings CRWD/PANW
conditions.notes: Green=beat + raised guidance, Amber=in-line, Red=miss + lowered

conditions.label: Enterprise security spending signals
conditions.notes: Green=accelerating, Amber=stable, Red=decelerating

conditions.label: Entry status

thesis: Inverse QQQ hedge — portfolio protection against tech selloff. Auto-flag for exit review if health <5. Inverse ETFs decay — if VIX <18 and QQQ reclaims 50d MA, close it.

conditions.label: VIX elevated (>18)
conditions.notes: <18 = hedge unnecessary, EXIT. 18-25 amber. >25 green.

conditions.label: QQQ below 50-day MA
conditions.notes: Agent: INVERT this — QQQ below MA = GREEN for PSQ, above = RED. Set toggle accordingly.

conditions.label: S&P 500 5-day trend declining
conditions.notes: Green=declining, Amber=flat, Red=rising (hedge is a drag). Agent: check ^GSPC 5d change.

conditions.label: Conflict escalation trend
conditions.notes: Green=escalating, Amber=stalemate, Red=de-escalating

conditions.label: Oil price 5-day trend rising
conditions.notes: Green=rising (inflationary pressure on tech), Amber=flat, Red=falling. Agent: check CL=F 5d change.

conditions.label: Days held (<10 days)
conditions.notes: Green=<10 days, Amber=10-20 days, Red=>20 days (decay risk). Agent: calculate from entry_date.

notes.text: [test] System initialized with comprehensive health framework

thesis: ASX energy major — LNG/oil exposure with geopolitical upside. Strong dividends. Watch energy concentration (XOP+WDS) — flag if >55% of portfolio.

conditions.label: WTI spot price
conditions.notes: <$60 = red, $60-70 = amber, >$70 = green

conditions.label: WDS not overextended (vs $27 target)
conditions.notes: <$30 = green (within 10% of $27 target), $30-33 = amber, >$33 = red (overextended >20%)

conditions.label: LNG spot price (JKM)
conditions.notes: Green=>$15/MMBtu, Amber=$10-15, Red=<$10

conditions.label: Qatar LNG exports disrupted
conditions.notes: Green=Qatar exports disrupted, Amber=partially restored, Red=fully restored

conditions.label: Combined energy exposure (XOP+WDS) <55%
conditions.notes: Green=<40%, Amber=40-55%, Red=>55% = CONCENTRATION WARNING. Includes XOP+WDS+INSW (tanker is energy-adjacent). Agent: read portfolio_checks.energy_tickers.

conditions.label: AUD/USD rate direction
conditions.notes: Green=weakening AUD (boosts USD earnings), Amber=stable, Red=strengthening AUD

thesis: Uncorrelated deep value hold. FCF inflection in 2026 as capex declines. Lowest-maintenance position — quarterly check, not 4-hourly. Only escalate if breaks $200 or capex goes wrong direction.

conditions.label: CHTR above $200 support
conditions.notes: <$200 = structural break (red)

conditions.label: CHTR above $180 (52-week low zone)
conditions.notes: <$180 = INVALIDATION

conditions.label: FCF thesis: capex declining per guidance
conditions.notes: Green=capex declining, Amber=flat, Red=increasing (thesis broken). Quarterly check only.

conditions.label: Broadband subscriber trend
conditions.notes: Green=losses moderating/gains, Amber=stable losses, Red=accelerating losses

conditions.label: Mobile segment growth
conditions.notes: Green=>1.5M net adds annualized, Amber=1-1.5M, Red=<1M (growth stalling)
